Q..name: Q
Q..text:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.x26dyZZZRvZpzK2X]{奎劳恩特}

恐惧等待着那些采集奎劳恩特的人。任何试图采集奎劳恩特的生物都会成为奎劳恩特诅咒的目标。若该生物在采集该生物的检定以及对抗诅咒的豁免中都成功，则其可以如常采集本条目中列出的物品。

奎劳恩特的诅咒（诅咒 15）

诅咒

魔法

精神

你被可怕的幻象纠缠，并感觉你的人生开始失去所有意义。书面文字失去其用途，偏执如冰冷的锁链将你束缚。

豁免检定 @Check[type:will|dc:32]

效果 现实化作活生生的噩梦。你无法在对抗精神效果的豁免检定或基于魅力的技能检定中成功或大成功。每当你尝试写下任何内容时，对他人而言都会变成难以辨认的涂鸦，尽管在你看来仍然清晰可读。你也会被死亡所吸引。在战斗中，你在自己回合的第一个动作必须用来疾行，尽可能接近一名敌对生物。若你已在某名敌对生物5尺内，则你改为浪费该动作，并在直到你下个回合开始前承受AC−5环境减值。每7天，你获得一次新的豁免检定以对抗该诅咒。该诅咒不会影响这次豁免检定。

[[/r 1d6#Quelaunt's Limbs]] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.9zvwPydNYe3FkqHq]{奎劳恩特的肢体}

[[/r 2d4#Vials of Nightmare Fuel]] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.14dbqzJzDNayC8uE]{噩梦燃料}小瓶

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.x26dyZZZRvZpzK2X]{Quelaunt}

Dread awaits those who harvest a quelaunt. A creature that attempts to harvest a quelaunt is targeted by the quelaunt’s curse. If the creature is successful in their check to harvest the creature and in their save against the curse, they may harvest the listed items in this entry as normal.

Quelaunt’s Curse (Curse 15)

Curse

magical

mental

You are plagued by terrible visions and feel your life begin to lose all meaning. The written word loses its purpose and paranoia binds you like cold chains.

Saving Throw @Check[type:will|dc:32]

Effect Reality turns into a living nightmare. You cannot succeed or critically succeed on saving throws against mental effects or on Charisma-based skill checks. Any time you attempt to write something, it comes out as illegible scribbles to others, though it appears legible to you. You are also drawn towards death. In combat, you must use your first action on your turn to Stride as close to a hostile creature as you can get. If you are already within 5 feet of a hostile creature, you instead waste the action, and you suffer a −5 circumstance penalty to AC until the beginning of your next turn. Every 7 days, you receive a new saving throw against the curse. The curse does not affect this saving throw.

[[/r 1d6#Quelaunt's Limbs]] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.9zvwPydNYe3FkqHq]{Quelaunt's Limbs}

What is the Harvest Compendium?.name: 什么是采集宝典？ What is the Harvest Compendium?
What is the Harvest Compendium?.text:
世上没有人比一队冒险者更需要战利品。《采集宝典》通过提供独特的战利品、皮革、器官，以及冒险队伍在旅行途中可能于遭遇中遇到的生物身上取得的其他怪物部件，来满足这一需求。

《采集宝典》中的每个生物条目都是独特的，不过若该生物属于特定群组，条目中出现的物品可能会重复。比如，所有龙的生物条目都会提供龙皮革，正如所有幽灵般的生物都可以采集到灵质。

《采集宝典》由两大部分组成：生物条目与附录。生物条目列出每个生物可获得的战利品。有时这些物品有完整描述；其他时候它们只是一个标题，用来引用官方资料或附录中已存在的某个物品。附录包含各式各样的新可制作战利品，例如火焰涂层油、幸运羽毛，以及用怪物皮革制作的各种护甲。

在游戏桌上使用《采集宝典》

《采集宝典》的用意，是提供令人满意且具体、并与队伍刚打败的敌人相对应的战利品。每个生物条目中的战利品都已进行平衡调整，除极少数例外，其提供的物品货币价值等同于该生物的等级。

某些生物——尤其是稀有且独特的生物——可能提供比该等级生物的标准收获更有价值的战利品。同样地，有些生物的条目所提供的战利品货币价值会低于其等级所适合的水平。大多数类人生物都属于这一类，因为类人生物通常除了他们身上穿戴的装备之外，很少能采集到其他东西。

使用《采集宝典》的所有新机制都收录在这本日志中，但GM可以为符合其游戏桌的风格而修改甚至忽略这些规则。有些桌可能会无视采集时间的需求，以换取更快的游戏节奏；而其他团体可能更偏好严格遵循书面规则。GM也可以选择使用独特的生物战利品部件，为商店与店铺的货物增添风味。

《采集宝典》是一种应当为战役增色的工具，而非控制战役。以最能强化你桌上游戏体验的方式使用这本宝典，即便这意味着打破“规则”。

No one in the world needs loot more than a band of adventurers. The Harvest Compendium answers this need by providing unique trophies, hides, organs, and other monster bits from the creatures an adventuring party may encounter on their travels.

Each creature entry in the Harvest Compendium is unique, though the items that appear in the entries can be repeated if the creature is part of a specific group. For instance, all creature entries for dragons provide dragonhide, just as all ghostly creatures can be harvested for ectoplasm.

The Harvest Compendium consists of two main parts: the creature entries and the appendices. The creature entries list the loot available from each creature. Sometimes these items have full descriptions; other times they are simply a header referencing a preexisting item in official material or in the appendices. The appendices contain a variety of the new craftable loot, such as oil of fire coating, lucky feathers, and various armors made from monster hides.

Using Harvest Compendium at the Table

The intention of the Harvest Compendium is to provide a satisfying, specific loot that correlates with the enemy the party just finished fighting. The loot of each creature entry has been balanced to provide items of monetary value equal to the creature’s level, with very few exceptions.

Some creatures—particularly rare and unique creatures—may provide loot that is more valuable than the standard haul for a creature of that level. In the same vein, some creatures have entries that provide loot of less monetary value than what is suitable for their level. Most humanoids fall into this category, as humanoids can rarely be harvested for anything other than the equipment they are wearing.

All the new mechanics for using the Harvest Compendium are found in this journal, but the GM can modify or even ignore these rules in favor of a style that better fits their table. Some tables might look past the harvest time requirements in favor of a speedier playstyle, while other groups might prefer to stick to the rules as written. The GM can also choose to use unique pieces of creature loot to spice up the wares of stores and shops.

The Harvest Compendium is a tool that should add to a campaign, not control it. Use the compendium in a way that best enhances play at your table, even if that means breaking the “rules.”

Harvest Compendium.name: 采集汇编 Harvest Compendium
Harvest Compendium.text:
冒险者勇敢面对世界的危险，而其中许多危险都有牙齿。能在喷吐火焰的巨龙或女妖刺耳的哀嚎下幸存，会让你有个绝佳的故事可讲——但如果你想要的不止这些呢？本合集提供了一份战利品清单，一群勇敢的冒险者可以从他们所杀死的怪物尸体上采集。

尽管本合集提供了大量战利品，所列出的物品并不代表某个生物的每一种情况。一条巨龙可能在与先前的冒险队伍战斗时失去了一只眼睛，因此只能采集到一只眼睛；或者该生物可能还在使用其数据表中未列出的物品。GM始终可以通过移除或添加物品来改变在某个生物身上可获得的战利品，以更好地契合他们的战役。

Adventurers brave the dangers of the world, and many of those dangers have teeth. Surviving a fire-breathing dragon or the piercing wail of a banshee leaves you with a great story to tell—but what if you want more than that? This compendium supplies a list of loot that a band of brave adventurers can harvest from the corpses of the monsters they slay.

Though this compendium has plenty of loot to offer, the listed items don’t represent every instance of a creature. A dragon might have lost an eye battling a previous adventure group and therefore only one eye can be harvested, or the creature may be wielding items in addition to those listed in its stat block. The GM can always change the available loot found on a creature, either by removing or adding items, to better fit their campaign.

Harvesting Creatures.name: 采集生物 Harvesting Creatures
Harvesting Creatures.text:
角色能够采集生物的方式取决于角色的技能以及生物的状态。任何人都能捡起一把断剑砍下头颅，但只有熟练的屠夫才能从巨龙身上剥下皮革。

如果你满足需求，你可以使用采集生物行动，尝试为了其可用战利品而采集一只生物。

新的制作受训动作

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.iKJ5aDFKstAhJCy2]{采集生物}

探索

操作

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.iKJ5aDFKstAhJCy2 inline]

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.QHHv5IIpwjdCSkbQ]{雕刻者工具包}

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.QHHv5IIpwjdCSkbQ inline]

雕刻者工具包可以用 4 gp 购买。

采集时间

采集一只生物所需的时间由其体型决定。如果角色无法或不愿意在总持续时间内完成采集，则其进行采集生物的制作检定的成功程度降低一步。然而，角色必须至少花费所列时间的一半来采集生物，才有机会获得任何战利品。

采集所需时间

体型时间
超小型10 分钟
小型30 分钟
中型1 小时
大型2 小时
巨型4 小时
超巨型8+ 小时

所列时间假设角色想尽可能获得更多战利品。如果角色只想要某个特定物品，例如一小瓶新鲜的蛇发女妖蜥蜴血液来拯救一名被石化的盟友，GM 可以缩短总采集持续时间。若 GM 认为合适，也同样可以延长采集持续时间。

生物的状态

如果一只生物已经腐烂了数周，那么可采集的东西会比刚被杀死时少。GM 决定是否能根据腐败阶段来采集某类战利品。例如，一头死亡超过一天的野猪无法采集成口粮，而巨龙的骷髅（特征）身上也没有任何皮革。

如果尸体严重受损、长时间暴露在自然环境中，或者恶劣天气使采集的处理变得困难，GM 可以对采集生物施加减值。

类人生物敌人

带有类人生物标签的生物无法像其他生物那样被掠夺。本文件提供了一些可以从这些敌人身上取走的战利品，例如武器、护甲以及其他装备，但不提供任何需要“采集”的物品，例如血液、皮或器官。这种掠夺方式保留给非类人生物的生物，也就是说，本宝典不提供诸如熊地精（特征）牙齿或蛇发女妖的头颅之类的东西。

The means by which a character can harvest a creature depends on the skill of the character and the state of the creature. Anyone can pick up a broken sword and cut off a head, but only a skilled butcher can carve the hide from a dragon.

If you meet the requirements, you can attempt to harvest a creature for its available loot using the Harvest Creature activity.

New Crafting Trained Action

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.iKJ5aDFKstAhJCy2]{Harvest Creature}

exploration

manipulate

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.iKJ5aDFKstAhJCy2 inline]

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.QHHv5IIpwjdCSkbQ]{Carver's Kit}

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.QHHv5IIpwjdCSkbQ inline]

A carver’s kit can be bought for 4 gp.

Harvest Time

The time it takes to harvest a creature is determined by its size. If a character is unable or unwilling to harvest for the total duration, their degree of success on the Crafting check made to harvest the creature is lowered by one step. However, a character must spend at least half the listed time harvesting a creature for the chance at any loot.

Time It Takes to Harvest

SizeTime
Tiny10 minutes
Small30 minutes
Medium1 hour
Large2 hours
Huge4 hours
Gargantuan8+ hours

The listed times assume a character wants to get as much loot as possible. If a character only wants a specific item, such as a vial of fresh basilisk blood to save an ally from being petrified, the GM can shorten the total harvest duration. The GM can likewise lengthen the harvest duration if they deem it appropriate.

State of the Creature

If a creature has been rotting away for several weeks, there is less to harvest than if it was freshly slain. It’s up to the GM to determine whether a certain type of loot can be harvested based on the stage of decay. For instance, a boar that has been dead more than a day cannot be harvested for rations, and the skeleton of a dragon doesn’t have any hide on it.

The GM can add penalties to Harvesting a Creature if the corpse is severely damaged, has been exposed to the elements for a long period of time, or if harsh weather makes the process of harvesting difficult.

Humanoid Foes

Creatures with the humanoid tag cannot be looted in the same manner as other creatures. This document provides some loot that can be taken from these enemies, such as weapons, armor, and other equipment, but no items that would need to be “harvested,” such as blood, skin, or organs. That method of looting is reserved for non-humanoid creatures, meaning this compendium doesn’t supply things like bugbear teeth or a medusa’s head.

Types of Loot.name: 战利品类型 Types of Loot
Types of Loot.text:
一个走运的冒险者可能会从倒下的敌人身上发现许多类型的战利品。有些战利品可以捡起后立即使用，或在简单修理后使用；而另一些则需要熟练的剥取者成功采集并处理后才有用。

制作非核心规则书中的物品

本宝典及其中的生物词条主要依据《Pathfinder 第二版 核心规则书》中的信息撰写。许多魔法与炼金物品存在于其他《Pathfinder 第二版》书籍中，其中某些原料适合作为制作该物品的替代材料。例如，一瓶 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.fE4EJiQkZNFJiTJ8]{纯净之光} 可以用来制作 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.iGT4UeQq3YFcNpEb]{瓶装阳光}(《亡者之书》)。《采集宝典》无法将《Pathfinder 第二版》现有物品全数纳入考量，但建议GM允许玩家使用本书中的原料与生物组件，来制作取自其他书籍与冒险路径的物品。

损坏物品

在激烈的战斗中，武器与护甲会遭受严重伤害，导致在修理前无法使用。本宝典中带有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{损坏} 状态的物品，其生命值等于其损坏阈值，除非GM另有裁定。

生物组件

生物组件可以作为、并且有时能被制作成，独特的装备。使用生物组件来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{制作} 物品时，遵循《核心规则书》中标准的制作规则，且总是将该组件作为制作需求。生物组件所列的价格，会从制作该物品所需的原始材料成本中扣除。GM可以将某个特定生物组件替换为另一种合适的材料，以更符合其游戏需求。

某些组件可作为消耗品，使你得以施放法术。除非物品中另有说明，只要满足使用该物品的所有其他需求，你不需要具备施法能力也能以这种方式使用该物品。

生物组件无法被制作，只能采集。

原料

原料是一类物品，可以被制作成其他东西，用来替代制作该物品所关联的部分或全部材料成本。该原料会在制作过程中被消耗。

在制作时，原料用于替代其他材料。这些原料以“单位”呈现，其单位形式会因原料性质与储存方式而异。例如，液体以小瓶计量，而粉末以小袋计量。角色在采集生物时必须有合适的容器来装这些原料。

当使用原料进行制作时，你使用的原料单位数等于该物品等级的一半（向上取整）。这些提供的原料会替代你在开始制作该物品时所提供的原始材料。例如，制作一瓶 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.V2TUEoiDwJ125qzN]{抗力药水}：制作6级药水需要3单位原料，制作10级药水需要5单位，依此类推。制作一瓶 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.yd3kEK21YknZLlcT]{炼金术士之火}：制作1级瓶需要1单位原料，制作3级瓶需要2单位，依此类推。

若GM允许，原料可以与工匠交易以换取合适的物品。若一队人收集了六小瓶 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.pAhcs65yYLa1G5xK]{天使血液} 并想把它们变成 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{治疗药水}，但他们没有时间进行制作，则可以直接用这些原料交换该物品。然而，这样做所需的原料单位数等于该物品的等级，而不是其等级的一半。例外是1级物品，此时需要2单位原料。以上例而言，队伍可以用六小瓶天使血液交换1瓶中等治疗药水；或者他们也可以花费4天，使用这些原料与一些金币，来尝试制作两瓶中等治疗药水。

原料不能被制作或购买，只能采集。

使用原料进行制作的示例

哈莉娜是一名10级游侠，制作拥有专家熟练。她的调整值为+14，并且拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.xWY5omyIcILNR7y1]{魔法制作} 专长。她有九袋 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.QNv0Tg5samaIAfwS]{雷电浓缩物}，并希望用它们来制作一些6级的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.cAyxcRSSnfscGyMa]{电击抗力药水}。GM暗中将DC设为22。

由于药水是消耗品，哈莉娜决定制作一批四瓶药水。这九袋雷电浓缩物作为其中三瓶药水的原始材料，而哈莉娜为该批次的第四瓶药水额外花费22 gp与5 sp来补足原始材料。经过4天工作后，哈莉娜尝试进行一次制作检定。她在制作检定上掷出10，总计24。成功！

哈莉娜不想再花更多时间来完成物品制作，于是决定支付剩余的材料成本90 gp，使药水立刻完成。通过使用雷电浓缩物，哈莉娜在制作这些药水上节省了77 gp与5 sp。

符文框架

框架提供将符文蚀刻到一件装备上所需的某些基础组件，使你在材料总成本上获得折扣。这些框架看起来像极其微小的符文符号，或是被嫁接进生物的皮、鳞片或骨骼之中，或是有时被蚀刻在护甲或武器的边缘上。

在蚀刻符文时，你只能应用一个框架。不同于生物组件的价格，框架的价格不计入制作该符文所需原始材料的总价格。例如，若一个框架价值50 gp并提供10%折扣，则所列符文的成本减少10%，而不是减少50 gp。

框架不能被制作或购买，只能采集。

战利品纪念物

某些生物可以被采集以获得战利品纪念物，这些是对冒险者没有制作或实用收益的物品。除作为可交易货物之外它们没有价值，唯一的例外是能提供炫耀资本。

战利品纪念物不能被制作，只能采集。

既有物品

某些生物战利品会引用《核心规则书》或类似资料中已列出的物品。例子包括紫虫毒液与巫妖尘。在会找到此类战利品的情况下（护甲、武器或基础冒险道具除外），物品旁会写有对相关资料的引用。

There are many types of loot a lucky adventurer might discover on a dead foe. Some pieces of loot can be picked up and used immediately or after simple repairs, while others require a proficient carver to successfully harvest and process before they are useful.

Crafting Items Not from the Core Rulebook

This compendium and the creature entries within have been written based on information found mainly in the Pathfinder Second Edition Core Rulebook. Many magic and alchemical items exist in other Pathfinder Second Edition books where certain ingredients would be suitable inserts for crafting the item. For example, a vial of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.fE4EJiQkZNFJiTJ8]{Pure Light} could be used to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.iGT4UeQq3YFcNpEb]{Bottled Sunlight}(Book of the Dead). The Harvest Compendium can’t take all existing items from the Pathfinder Second Edition roster into account, but GMs are encouraged to allow their players to use the ingredients and creature components herein to craft items taken from other books and adventure paths.

Broken Items

In the heat of battle, weapons and armor are subject to heavy damage, leaving them unusable until repaired. The @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{Broken} items found in this compendium have Hit Points equal to their Broken Threshold, unless determined otherwise by the GM.

Creature Components

Creature components can be used as, and sometimes be crafted into, unique equipment. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Crafting} something from creature components follows the standard crafting rules found in the Core Rulebook and always has the component as a craft requirement. The listed price of the creature component is subtracted from the raw material cost needed to craft the item. The GM can switch a specific creature component for another suitable material to better suit their game.

Some components act as consumables that allow you to cast a spell. Unless stated in the item, you do not need to have a spellcasting ability to use the item in this way, provided all other requirements for using the item are met.

Creature components cannot be crafted, only harvested.

Ingredients

Ingredients are a category of item that can be crafted into something else, replacing some or all the material costs associated with crafting that item. The ingredient is consumed in the crafting process.

In crafting, ingredients are used in place of other materials. These ingredients are presented in units, the nature of which differs depending on the ingredient’s properties and how it should be stored. For instance, liquids are measured in vials, whereas powders are measured in pouches. A character must have a suitable container for these ingredients when they harvest a creature.

When crafting with ingredients, you use ingredient units equal to half the item’s level rounded up. These supplied ingredients replace the raw materials you supply to begin crafting the item. For instance, crafting a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.V2TUEoiDwJ125qzN]{Potion of Resistance} requires 3 units of an ingredient for a 6th-level potion, 5 units for a 10th-level potion, and so on. Crafting a flask of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.yd3kEK21YknZLlcT]{Alchemist's Fire} requires 1 unit of an ingredient for a 1st-level flask, 2 for a 3rd-level flask, and so on.

If the GM allows it, ingredients can be traded with artisans for a suitable item. If a party has gathered six vials of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.pAhcs65yYLa1G5xK]{Angel Blood} and wants to turn them into @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.2RuepCemJhrpKKao]{Healing Potions}, but they don’t have time to craft them, they can trade the ingredients for the item directly. However, doing so requires ingredient units equal to the item’s level rather than half its level. An exception is items that are 1st-level items, where 2 ingredient units are required. Using the above example, the party can trade their six vials of angel blood for one moderate healing potion, or they can spend 4 days using the ingredients and some gold to potentially craft two moderate healing potions instead.

Ingredients cannot be crafted or bought, only harvested.

Crafting with Ingredients Example

Halina is a 10th-level ranger with the expert rank in Crafting. She has a modifier of +14 and she has the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.xWY5omyIcILNR7y1]{Magical Crafting} feat. She has nine pouches of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.QNv0Tg5samaIAfwS]{Lightning Concentrate} and wants to use them to craft some 6th-level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.cAyxcRSSnfscGyMa]{Potions of Electricity Resistance}. The GM secretly sets a DC of 22.

As the potion is a consumable, Halina decides to craft a batch of four potions. The nine pouches of lightning concentrate act as raw materials for three of the potions, and Halina expends 22 gp and 5 sp on raw materials for the fourth potion in the batch. After 4 days of work, Halina attempts a Crafting check. She rolls a 10 on her Crafting check for a total of 24. A success!

Rather than spend any more time crafting the items, Halina decides to pay the remaining material cost of 90 gp to have the potions finished immediately. By using the lightning concentrate, Halina saved 77 gp and 5 sp on crafting the potions.

Rune Frameworks

Frameworks supply some basic components needed for etching a rune into a piece of equipment, affording you a discount on the total cost of materials. These frameworks look like miniscule runic symbols either grafted into a creature’s hide, scales, or bone, or sometimes etched onto the borders of armor or weapons.

You can only apply one framework while etching a rune. Unlike the price of creature components, the price of frameworks does not count towards the total price of raw materials for crafting the rune. For instance, if a framework is worth 50 gp and it provides a 10% discount, the cost of the listed rune is reduced by 10%, not by 50 gp.

Frameworks cannot be crafted or bought, only harvested.

Trophies

Some creatures can be harvested for trophies, these being items that have no crafting or utility benefits for an adventurer. They have no value other than as trade goods, except for providing bragging rights.

Trophies cannot be crafted, only harvested.

Existing Items

Some creature loot references items already listed in the Core Rulebook or similar material. Examples of this include purple worm venom and lich dust. In cases where such loot would be found (besides armor, weapons, or basic adventuring gear), reference to the relevant material has been written by the item.

Handling the Loot.name: 处理战利品 Handling the Loot
Handling the Loot.text:
一旦你拿到了战利品，你就得想办法如何使用它。大多数生物部位在能使用之前都需要以某种方式进行处理，只有少数物品能在采集后立刻使用。

可选规则：超专注制作

为了加快制作进程，并让队伍能够在移动途中而非仅在休整模式期间制作物品，GM可以在游戏中引入“超专注制作”动作。这使角色能够在不必为该工作投入整整一天的情况下开始或推进一项制作项目，不过会伴随某些缺点。

制作 受训 动作：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.DAv1YJpyiS4jjJEO]{超专注制作}

探索

操作

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.Item.DAv1YJpyiS4jjJEO inline]

可食用物品

可食用物品，例如生肉或天使的神圣之舌，必须被烹饪或腌制后才能安全食用。如果你尝试食用尚未烹饪或腌制的可食用物品，你必须在一次与你等级相符的标准DC强韧豁免中成功，否则将陷入恶心1，持续1小时。你可以使用“腌制食物”受训动作来腌制可食用物品。

求生 受训 动作：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.WLM9BcBb5bLXJJR4]{腌制食物}

探索

maniplation

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.WLM9BcBb5bLXJJR4 inline]

未处理物品

未处理物品在被炼金精炼之前不会发挥作用。这些通常是直接从生物身上采集的毒液与毒药。要让它们以伤害型毒药的方式发挥作用，必须使用一套炼金工具并通过“处理物品”受训动作来使其稳定。

制作 受训 动作：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.HMtgoJ8WgsFjcbxO]{处理物品}

探索

操作

需求 你正手持或穿戴一套炼金工具。

 你花费1小时精炼一个从生物身上采集的毒液、毒药或类似物品，从而移除该物品的未处理特征并使其可用。

GM设定DC，通常为该物品等级对应的标准DC。

成功 该物品的未处理特征被移除，现在可以使用。

失败 该物品被毁且无法使用。 

价格

生物组件与原料无法在商店中购买。每条战利品条目所列的价格，是给想通过出售这些物品来处理掉它们的冒险者用的参考。物品可以按所列价格的一半出售；若在契约条件下工作，则可按全价出售。

例如，一名冒险者可能接到一份关于“安赫拉夫蜂巢母体下颚骨”的契约，并在成功杀死并采集该生物后，上交下颚骨以获得其全额50 gp的价值。然而，这名冒险者还从安赫拉夫蜂巢母体身上获得了10瓶不纯的酸液，每瓶所列价格为1 gp。由于酸液不属于契约的一部分，冒险者只能以半价出售，每瓶净得额外5 sp。

新物品的配方、稀有度与原材料成本

本资料集为无畏的冒险者提供了许多新的魔法物品、油剂与药水。要制作这些物品，必须知晓其配方；但由于这些物品往往与特定生物独特绑定，配方通常很难找到。

如果某个魔法物品具有罕见（稀有度）稀有度，它的配方只为那些研究被杀死生物多年的专家猎人所知。这些工匠可以在猎人公会中找到，他们以从被杀死的怪物身上制作货物为生。其中一些人也许愿意教给冒险者一些手艺秘密，或至少以中间工匠的身份为其代工——当然，要付钱。没有稀有度的魔法物品则更容易制作，其配方可在许多大城市购买。

如果你能将某件物品制作成一把预先装有符文的武器或一套预先装有符文的护甲，你需要同时知晓该物品与该符文的配方。例如，如果你要用一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.VQ8MQtUztlrhqveD]{脑收集者之爪}来制作一把@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.mlrmkpOlwpnGkw4I]{重锤}，你需要制作重锤的配方以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{打击}符文的配方。你必须满足制作该物品与该符文二者的等级需求与金钱成本。

制作带有预刻符文的装备

费利克斯是一名5级法师，拥有制作的专家熟练阶级，并且正准备进行几周的休整模式。他的调整值为+10，并拥有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.xWY5omyIcILNR7y1]{魔法制作}专长。他手上有一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.VQ8MQtUztlrhqveD]{脑收集者之爪}，并想用它制作一把@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.9iDqOLNFKxiTcFKE]{钉头锤}。GM暗中将DC设为19。

用这只爪制作钉头锤意味着成品在完成时已经刻有一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{打击}符文，但费利克斯仍然需要打击符文的配方与材料。他必须支付钉头锤价值的一半（1 gp）以及4级打击符文（65 gp）的一半来尝试制作该物品，总计33 gp。然而，脑收集者之爪的材料成本为30 gp，将所需投入降低为3 gp。

支付成本后，费利克斯花费4天制作钉头锤，并进行一次制作检定。他在制作检定中掷骰得到13，总计23。检定成功！

费利克斯决定再花10天继续制作该物品，将成本额外降低10 gp，然后支付剩余的23 gp并完成这把武器。

Once you’ve gotten the loot, you have to figure out how to use it. Most creature parts need to be processed in some way before they can be used, and only few items can be used right after harvesting.

Optional Rule: Hyper-Focused Craft

To speed up the crafting process and allow a party to make items while on the move rather than during downtime only, the GM can introduce the Hyper-Focused Crafting action to the game. This allows characters to start or make headway on a crafting project without having to dedicate an entire day to the endeavor, though with certain drawbacks.

Crafting Trained Action: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.DAv1YJpyiS4jjJEO]{Hyper-Focused Craft}

exploration

manipulate

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.Item.DAv1YJpyiS4jjJEO inline]

Edible Items

Edible items, like raw meat or an angel’s divine tongue, must be cooked or cured before they can be safely consumed. If you try to consume an edible item that has not been cooked or cured, you must succeed at a standard DC Fortitude save for your level or become sickened 1 for 1 hour. You can cure edible items using the Cure Food trained action.

Survival Trained Action: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.WLM9BcBb5bLXJJR4]{Cure Food}

exploration

maniplation

@Embed[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.WLM9BcBb5bLXJJR4 inline]

Unprocessed Items

Unprocessed items do not function until they have been alchemically refined. These are typically venoms and poisons harvested directly from a creature. To make them function as an injury-based poison, they must be stabilized using a set of alchemist’s tools and the Process Item trained action.

Crafting Trained Action: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-actions.HMtgoJ8WgsFjcbxO]{Process Item}

exploration

manipulate

Requirements You are holding or wearing a set of alchemist’s tools.

 You spend 1 hour refining a venom, poison, or similar item harvested from a creature, thereby removing the unprocessed trait from the item and making it useable.

The GM sets the DC, which is usually a standard DC for the item’s level.

Success The item’s unprocessed trait is removed, and it is now useable.

Failure The item is ruined and cannot be used.  

Price

Creature components and ingredients cannot be purchased in stores. The price listed on each loot entry is there as a guide for adventurers who want to get rid of these items by selling them. An item can be sold for half its listed price, or at full price if working under contract.

For instance, an adventurer might pick up a contract for an ankhrav hive mother mandible and, after successfully slaying and harvesting the creature, turn in the mandible for its full 50 gp value. However, the adventurer also got 10 vials of impure acid from the ankhrav hive mother, each of which has the listed price of 1 gp. Because the acid was not part of the contract, the adventurer is only able to sell it for half price, netting an additional 5 sp per vial.

Formula, Rarity, and Raw Materials Cost for New Items

This compendium offers many new magic items, oils, and potions for the intrepid adventurer. To make these items, their formula must be known, but given that the items are often uniquely tied to specific creatures, formulas are often hard to find.

If a magic item has the uncommon rarity, its formula is only known by expert hunters who have studied the slain creature for years. These artisans can be found in hunting guilds where they make a livelihood out of crafting goods from slain monsters. Some of them may be willing to teach an adventurer a few secrets of their trade, or at the very least act as an intermediary artisan for them—for a price, of course. Magic items with no rarity are more easily crafted and their formulas are available for purchase in many major cities.

If you can craft an item into a weapon or set of armor that has a rune pre-installed, you need to know the formula for both the item and the rune. For example, if you are crafting a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.mlrmkpOlwpnGkw4I]{Maul} out of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.VQ8MQtUztlrhqveD]{Brain Collector Claw}, you need the formula for crafting a maul and the formula for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} rune. You must meet the level requirement and monetary cost for crafting both the item and the rune.

Crafting Equipment with Pre-Etched Runes

Felix is a 5th-level wizard who has the expert rank in Crafting and who is looking at a few weeks of downtime. He has a modifier of +10 and he has the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.xWY5omyIcILNR7y1]{Magical Crafting} feat. He has a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-harvest-compendium.harvest-compendium-equipment.VQ8MQtUztlrhqveD]{Brain Collector Claw} in his possession and wants to craft a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.9iDqOLNFKxiTcFKE]{Mace} out of it. The GM secretly sets a DC of 19.

Crafting a mace out of the claw means that it comes with a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} rune already etched into it when completed, but Felix still needs the formula and the materials for the striking rune. He must spend half the value of the mace (1 gp) and the 4th-level striking rune (65 gp) to attempt to craft the item, coming out to 33 gp. However, the brain collector claw has a material cost of 30 gp, lowering the required investment to 3 gp.

Paying the cost, Felix spends 4 days working on the mace and attempts a Crafting check. He rolls a 13 on his Crafting check for a total of 23. A successful check!

Felix decides to spend another 10 days working on the item, reducing the cost by an additional 10 gp, before paying the remaining 23 gp and finishing the weapon.
